import io
import string
import list

fn flush(_ nums: List<Int>, _ cur: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(cur)
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      nums = flush(nums, cur)
      cur = ""
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  flush(nums, cur)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_line(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let n = nums.len()
  let take = if k > n
    n
  else
    k
  end

  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    used = list.push(used, 0)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut round = 0
  while round < take
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      let u = match used.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        1
      end
      if u == 0
        let val = match nums.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if best_idx == -1 or val > best_val
          best_idx = j
          best_val = val
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end

    mut new_used: List<Int> = []
    mut k2 = 0
    while k2 < n
      if k2 == best_idx
        new_used = list.push(new_used, 1)
      else
        let u2 = match used.get(k2)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        new_used = list.push(new_used, u2)
      end
      k2 = k2 + 1
    end
    used = new_used

    if round == 0
      out = "#{best_val}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{best_val}"
    end
    round = round + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
